divergence.preamble: Before reporting, read the project manifests (composer.json/package.json and their lockfiles) and pin every finding to the installed test-stack versions (pestphp/pest, phpunit/phpunit, laravel/dusk, vitest, jest, @playwright/test, @testing-library/*, msw) — do not flag patterns the installed version already solves, and do not suggest APIs above it. Also review coverage of the diff: for production code changed without a corresponding test, name the missing test and the pyramid layer it belongs at.

description: Review test code and coverage against testing-best-practices
